zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Marshall於1435年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾德林時，他的父親Sir John Delta Marshall35歲，母親Elizabeth Emma Bingham26歲。他於1452年與Catherine Neville在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾德林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年9月20日在英國諾廷加姆爾素斯 姆斯哈姆享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Marshall于1435年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾德林时，他的父亲Sir John Delta Marshall35岁，母亲Elizabeth Emma Bingham26岁。他于1452年与Catherine Neville在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾德林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年9月20日在英国諾廷加姆爾素斯 姆斯哈姆享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marshall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.
Americanized form of German   Marschall  .
Americanized form of French   Mercier  .

variants.name: Marchel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jacek, Ryszard.  German Ernst.

Polish: probably from French maréchal or Old French maresc(h)al, which was originally an occupational name for someone who was in charge of the horses of a household, later a military rank for a senior general. See Marshall and compare Marszalek .

variants.name: Mercier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Gaston, Lucien, Aurele, Jacques, Normand, Laurent, Michel, Valmont.

French and Channel Islands (Jersey): occupational name for a merchant, from Old French mercier, from Late Latin merciarius (an agent derivative of merx, genitive mercis ‘merchandise’). This name was also taken to England by Huguenot refugees. Compare Marshall and Mercy .

variants.name: Maniscalco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Vito, Sal, Antonio, Ignazio, Carmelo, Francesco, Gaspare, Saverio, Antonino, Carlo, Damiano.

Italian (southern): occupational name from maniscalco ‘farrier’, altered from marescalco by folk etymology, probably influenced by mano ‘hand’, from medieval Latin mariscalcus, marescalcus. Compare Marshall .

variants.name: Marchal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Jacques, Maryse, Philippe, Pierre, Veronique.

French and Walloon: status name or occupational name from Old French maresc(h)al ‘marshal’. The term is of ancient Germanic origin (from marah ‘horse, mare’ + scalc ‘servant’) and was originally applied to a man who looked after horses. In the Middle Ages it also came to be used on the one hand as an occupational name for a farrier, and on the other as a status name for an officer of state, in particular a member of a royal household with military responsibilities. Compare English Marshall and 2 below.
English: variant of   Marshall  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland, and is found mainly in Glamorgan, Wales.

variants.name: Maskell
meanings: English: variant of Marshall , derived from Middle English, Old French maresc(h)al ‘marshal’. The first element in the placename Mascallsbury (Essex) derives from the surname of a 13th-century individual named Robert le Marescal.

variants.name: Marszalek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Piotr, Alicja, Andrzej, Eugeniusz, Henryk, Jerzy, Kazimierz, Mieczyslaw, Wieslaw, Zbigniew, Zofia, Zygmunt.

Polish (Marszałek): occupational or status name from the vocabulary word marszałek ‘marshal’, denoting anything from a high court official, a field marshal, or the chairman of the Polish parliament, to the senior servant in a great household. Compare English Marshall .

variants.name: Marshell
meanings: English: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marschall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Hedwig, Juergen, Reinhard, Theresia, Wilfried.

German: occupational name for a man in the service of a member of the nobility, originally one who looked after the horses, Middle High German marschalc (from mar(c) ‘noble horse’ + schalk ‘servant’). In time the term came to be used for a military rank or a certain court official. Compare Marshall .
English: variant of   Marshall  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marshal
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Marshall was born in 1435, in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Delta Marshall, was 35 and his mother, Elizabeth Emma Bingham, was 26. He married Catherine Neville in 1452, in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 September 1505, in South Muskham, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Marshall est né en 1435, à Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Delta Marshall, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Emma Bingham, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Neville en 1452, à Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1505, à South Muskham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Marshall 1435 in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Delta Marshall 35 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Emma Bingham 26. Er hat 1452 in Gedling, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Catherine Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. September 1505 im Alter von 70 Jahren in South Muskham, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Marshall è nato il nel 1435 nel Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Delta Marshall, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Emma Bingham, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Neville nel 1452, nel Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1505, nel South Muskham, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Marshallが1435年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアジェドリングで生まれた時，父Sir John Delta Marshallは35歳，母Elizabeth Emma Binghamは26歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアジェドリングでCatherine Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年9月20日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウス ムスクハムで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Marshall(이)가 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 게들링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Delta Marshall(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Emma Bingham(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 게들링에서 Catherine Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 9월 20일 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스 무스카에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Marshall nasceu em 1435, em Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Delta Marshall, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Emma Bingham, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Neville em 1452, em Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1505, em South Muskham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Marshall родился в 1435 г. в местности джедлинг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Delta Marshall было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Emma Bingham, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Neville в 1452 г. в местности джедлинг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 сентября 1505 г. в местности соут мусхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Marshall nació en 1435, en Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Delta Marshall, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Emma Bingham, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Catherine Neville en 1452, en Gedling, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1505, en South Muskham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
